mapper.update: update ${tableName} set transNumber = #{transNumber}, settleSuccessTime = #{settleSuccessTime}, actual_settlement_exchange_rate_type = #{actualSettlementExchangeRateType}, actual_settlement_amount = #{actualSettlementAmount}, actual_settlement_exchange_rate = #{actualSettlementExchangeRate}, pubts = pubts where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and id= #{detailId}
update ${tableName} set transNumber = #{transNumber} where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and id= #{detailId}

update ${tableName} set transNumber = #{transNumber}, settleSuccessTime = #{settleSuccessTime}, settle_exchange_rate_type = #{actualSettlementExchangeRateType}, settle_amount = #{actualSettlementAmount}, settle_exchange_rate = #{actualSettlementExchangeRate}, pubts = pubts where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and id= #{detailId}

update ${tableName} set
pubts = pubts,
settle_status = #{settlestatus},
isToPushCspl = #{isToPushCspl},
refundSum = #{refundSum},
settleerrorSum = #{settleerrorSum},
settlesuccessSum = #{settlesuccessSum},
is_occupy_budget = #{isOccupyBudget},
billClaimId = #{billClaimId},
bankReconciliationId = #{bankReconciliationId},
associationStatus = #{associationStatus},
where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and id = #{id}
update ${tableName} set pubts = pubts, billClaimId = null, bankReconciliationId = null, associationStatus = 0 where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and id = #{id}
update ${tableName} set pubts = pubts, bankReconciliationId = null where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and id = #{id}
update ${tableName} set smartcheckno = #{smartcheckno},pubts = pubts where ytenant_id = #{ytenantId} and id= #{id}
